## Testing

- [ ] Manual testing notes added, if UI or gameplay behavior changed

## CI, Security, and Quality Checklist

- [ ] This PR targets the intended branch and has a focused scope
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, or local machine paths are committed
- [ ] Dependency Review has no new high or critical findings
- [ ] Sonar analysis is passing or intentionally skipped because repository secrets/variables are not configured
- [ ] Coverage impact was checked if the JaCoCo quality gate is present on the target branch
- [ ] Documentation was updated for workflow, security, or operational changes
